dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The rules-context-loader step executed flawlessly with schema validation success. It produced a significant reasoning output of 5,973 tokens, indicating a thorough ingestion and application of architectural rules to the context.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The evolution map processing handled nearly 49,000 context tokens while maintaining structural integrity and schema compliance. The generation of over 5,500 reasoning tokens suggests a deep exploration of architectural cause-and-effect relationships.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The alignment-engine successfully bridged architectural work to intent, with the intent generator producing a precise 2,125-token output. All spans reached 'ok' status, demonstrating effective resolution of architectural trade-offs.
